AXI Write Engine Completion Status

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x178
Size:
0x4
Source:
stream_regs.rdl

Description

Per-channel write engine all_complete flags

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] RSVD r 0x0 -
[7:0] WR_COMPLETE r - -

Field Descriptions

RSVD

Reserved

WR_COMPLETE

Write completion bits [7:0] - 1=all writes complete, 0=writes pending
